title: Ruben X Fresh Animation addon
description: adds a new Reuben pig from minecraft story mode when renaming to "Reuben" with fresh animation
body:
required: **[optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) and [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)**

Rename a pig "**Reuben**" with a nametag to get a model and a texture from the story mode pig called "**Reuben**" X **FA**, you need to use fresh animations and this pack on top to use it

fresh animations resource pack needed: [Fresh Animation](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)  
original: [Reuben original pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/let-skeletons-have-hands-(67-edition))
